RKSS-SID-OSPOT2U.name: OSPOT2U
notes: This record intentionally duplicates fix and segment data so each procedure can be reviewed independently.
Coordinates are extracted from RKSS SID/STAR chart coding tables where available; altitude/speed/path-terminator fields are reserved for row-level table parsing.
